vectors.description: MCP tools/call: get weather for a location
vectors.notes: MCP spec example: tools/call request for weather. SAL uses E:EQ (environmental query) with location target.

vectors.description: MCP tools/call response: weather result
vectors.json_payload: {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"result":{"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Current weather in New York:\nTemperature: 72\u00b0F\nConditions: Partly cloudy"}],"isError":false}}
vectors.notes: MCP spec example: tools/call response. SAL uses D:RTN (return transmit) wrapping the query result.

vectors.description: MCP tools/call error response
vectors.json_payload: {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":4,"result":{"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Invalid departure date: must be in the future. Current date is 08/08/2025."}],"isError":true}}
vectors.notes: MCP spec example: tool error response. SAL uses A:NACK (negative acknowledgment) with error slot.

vectors.description: MCP tools/list request
vectors.notes: MCP spec example: tool discovery. SAL uses A:DISCOV (discovery) with wildcard query.

vectors.description: MCP progress notification for long-running operation
vectors.notes: MCP reference guide: progress notification. SAL uses P:PROG with target and ratio slot.

vectors.description: OpenAI function call: get_weather tool invocation
vectors.notes: OpenAI docs: function call output. SAL uses E:EQ with location and unit slot.

vectors.description: OpenAI function call output: weather result returned to model
vectors.notes: OpenAI docs: function output. SAL uses D:RTN wrapping result.

vectors.description: OpenAI function definition: get_delivery_date tool schema
vectors.json_payload: {"type":"function","function":{"name":"get_delivery_date","description":"Get the delivery date for a customer order.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"order_id":{"type":"string","description":"The customer order ID."}},"required":["order_id"]}}}
vectors.notes: OpenAI docs: function definition schema. SAL uses D:Q (data query) with parameter and query slots.

vectors.description: OpenAI tool call: assistant requests function execution
vectors.notes: OpenAI docs: assistant tool_call message. SAL encodes the query directly.

vectors.description: OpenAI tool result: function response message
vectors.notes: OpenAI docs: tool response. SAL uses D:RTN with the return value.

vectors.description: A2A message/send: client sends task to remote agent
vectors.json_payload: {"id":"abc123","jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"message/send","params":{"message":{"role":"user","parts":[{"type":"text","text":"Search for flights from NYC to London on December 15"}],"messageId":"msg-001"}}}
vectors.notes: A2A codelab: message/send. SAL uses A:AR (agentic request) with route and date slots.

vectors.description: A2A task response: agent returns completed task with artifact
vectors.notes: A2A spec: task completion with artifact. SAL uses J:DONE then D:RTN with structured result.

vectors.description: A2A agent card: capability discovery (skills subset)
vectors.json_payload: {"name":"Weather Agent","description":"Provides real-time weather information","url":"https://weather-agent.example.com","version":"1.0.0","capabilities":{"streaming":true,"pushNotifications":false},"skills":[{"id":"get-weather","name":"Get Weather","description":"Returns current weather for a location"}]}
vectors.notes: A2A spec: agent card. SAL uses A:DISCOV to advertise capability by namespace.

vectors.description: A2A message/send with data part: structured payload
vectors.notes: A2A spec: data part with structured financial payload. SAL uses K:XFR (asset transfer) with accounts and amount.

vectors.description: CrewAI task delegation: research agent assigned a search task
vectors.json_payload: {"description":"Find and summarize the latest AI news","expected_output":"A bullet list summary of the top 5 most important AI news","agent":{"role":"AI Technology Researcher","goal":"Research the latest AI developments","verbose":true},"tools":["SerperDevTool"],"async_execution":false}
vectors.notes: CrewAI docs: task definition. SAL uses J:GOAL (declare goal) with agent target and A:AR for tool request.

vectors.description: CrewAI task output: structured JSON result
vectors.json_payload: {"description":"Find and summarize the latest AI news","summary":"Top 5 AI developments: GPT-5 launch, Claude 4 release, Gemini 2.0, Llama 4, Mistral Large 3","raw":"## Top 5 AI News\n1. GPT-5 launched with...","json_dict":{"main_points":["GPT-5 launch","Claude 4","Gemini 2.0"],"key_technologies":["transformers","MoE","RLHF"]},"agent":"AI Technology Researcher"}
vectors.notes: CrewAI docs: TaskOutput object. SAL uses J:DONE with D:RTN for result payload.

vectors.description: CrewAI agent kickoff with conversation history
vectors.json_payload: [{"role":"user","content":"I need information about large language models"},{"role":"assistant","content":"I'd be happy to help with that! What specifically would you like to know?"},{"role":"user","content":"What are the latest developments in 2025?"}]
vectors.notes: CrewAI docs: agent kickoff with message history. SAL encodes the instruction, not the conversation.

vectors.description: CrewAI task with context dependency: write_blog depends on research
vectors.json_payload: {"description":"Write a full blog post about the importance of AI and its latest news","expected_output":"Full blog post that is 4 paragraphs long","agent":"writer_agent","context":["research_ai_task","research_ops_task"]}
vectors.notes: CrewAI docs: task with context dependencies. SAL uses J:GOAL chained to J:BLOCK for deps. '->' is natural language here; actual SAL would be a compound with THEN operator.

vectors.description: AutoGen HandoffMessage: transfer execution to another agent
vectors.json_payload: {"type":"HandoffMessage","id":"msg-hnd-001","source":"assistant","content":"Transferred to flights_refunder, adopting the role of flights_refunder immediately.","target":"flights_refunder","context":[],"metadata":{},"created_at":"2025-11-01T10:00:00Z"}
vectors.notes: AutoGen AgentChat: HandoffMessage. SAL uses J:HANDOFF with target agent.

vectors.description: AutoGen StructuredMessage: categorization output
vectors.notes: AutoGen tutorial: StructuredMessage with typed content. SAL uses J:BELIEF (assert belief state).

vectors.description: AutoGen conversation message with function_call
vectors.notes: AutoGen 0.2: conversation message with function_call. SAL uses A:AR with tool target.

vectors.description: AutoGen component serialization: agent config dump
vectors.json_payload: {"provider":"autogen_agentchat.agents.AssistantAgent","component_type":"agent","version":1,"component_version":1,"description":null,"config":{"name":"assistant","model_client":{"provider":"autogen_ext.models.openai.OpenAIChatCompletionClient","component_type":"model","version":1,"component_version":1,"config":{"model":"gpt-4o"}},"handoffs":[{"target":"flights_refunder","description":"Handoff to flights_refunder.","name":"transfer_to_flights_refunder","message":"Transferred to flights_refunder, adopting the role of flights_refunder immediately."},{"target":"user","description":"Handoff to user.","name":"transfer_to_user","message":"Transferred to user, adopting the role of user immediately."}],"system_message":"Use tools to solve tasks.","description":"An agent that provides assistance with ability to use tools."}}
vectors.notes: AutoGen serialization docs: full agent config. SAL uses C:SPAWN for agent creation and J:HANDOFF for handoff routes.

vectors.description: Clinical: query ICD-10 code for pneumothorax diagnosis
vectors.notes: Domain scenario over MCP transport. SAL uses H:ICD Layer 2 accessor. ICD codes stored without dots in MDR.

vectors.description: Financial: execute a payment transfer between accounts
vectors.notes: Domain scenario over OpenAI function calling. SAL uses K:PAY with structured slots.

vectors.description: Security: request encryption of a payload with key rotation
vectors.notes: Domain scenario over A2A. SAL uses S:ENC then S:ROTATE as a sequence.

vectors.description: Compute: scale a service to 5 replicas and set resource limits
vectors.notes: Domain scenario over AutoGen. SAL uses compound C:SCALE with inline resource limits.

vectors.description: Logging: write audit record for a compliance event
vectors.json_payload: {"description":"Log the compliance check result for transaction TXN-9921","expected_output":"Audit log entry with timestamp and result","agent":{"role":"Compliance Officer","goal":"Maintain regulatory compliance audit trail"},"output_json":{"transaction_id":"TXN-9921","check_type":"AML","result":"pass","severity":"informational","timestamp":"2025-12-01T14:30:00Z"}}
vectors.notes: Domain scenario over CrewAI. SAL uses L:AUDIT with I:AML pass result and L:SEV severity 6 (informational).

vectors.description: Security: MITRE ATT&CK technique lookup for phishing detection
vectors.notes: Domain scenario: MITRE ATT&CK lookup over MCP. SAL resolves T1566 via MDR corpus.

vectors.description: Geospatial: calculate route between two waypoints
vectors.notes: Domain scenario: navigation over OpenAI function calling. SAL uses G:ROUT with coordinate pair.
